name: Fuse
short_description: A cozy, 3D, puzzle platformer with a underlying story. Play as cute origami characters exploring a vast world through puzzles, combat and platforming. Fight your way past enemies and rid the world of the black tar.
detailed_description:
Embark on a captivating journey in Fuse - an immersive adventure that blends action, stealth, and puzzle-solving in a unique gameplay experience!

Seamlessly shift between two distinct characters, each offering their own specialized abilities. Master the art of stealth by using paper planes to distract enemies, or fly your way past the shadowed depths of the mountains. Merge their abilities to form a swift and powerful melee combatant, ready to face any foe.

As you progress through the game, you'll confront enemies, overcome environmental obstacles, and solve puzzles to uncover fragments of the past.

Game Features:

  • Environment. A world made of paper, wool, and creativity — cut, glued, and brought to life by hand.

  • Puzzles. Use each character’s unique strengths to overcome challenges together.

Story. Experience a narrative beyond words — immersive, emotional, and open to interpretation.

reviews.review_text:
Fun little platformer would make a great co-op game with a friend. 8/10

https://youtu.be/mlNpBrNytwE?si=3pG0sXMVqicM7vpJ

An absolutely cozy game with great vibes and amazing world! Already spent some time playing it and it's great! It's a bitesized game that can be completed with 30-90 minutes depending on your playstyle. Once completed, it's nice to come back and just explore some content that you might have missed, like achievements.

Love the music and characters <3  It's a short experience that doesn't overstay its welcome, totally worth it! Also, I'm lowkey proud solved the music puzzles despite identifying as mostly tone death xD
Super cute game with really cozy music and vibes :)

I really liked this one. The theme and graphics were really well done. The gameplay felt like a single player co-op game.

The puzzles were extremely simple, so don't expect this one to burn your brain. I'm not saying this as a negative, since this game is more about two origami critters going on a journey than it is about working your way through difficult puzzles.

Definitely check this one out.
